prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为4578→5628→8828→9940→10262名，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约4634名，2025年基准位次约10262名；本省物理类计划2021年45人、2022年50人、2023年51人、2024年66人、2025年70人；2026年计划73人，较2025年增加3人，小幅扩招约4.3%，理论上使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉文件中无上海财经大 学显著事件记录，整体声誉平稳；抖音综合热度排名第99位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等，未见明显负面舆情或报考热度异常信号；工商管理A+、应用经 济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A类学科，财经学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力持续；211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，近年稳定在33–35名区间，属全国顶尖财经类院校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2024年"分化观望"（hea t_index 65.49），较2023年小幅升温；统计学A-对应数据科学、人工智能等新设专业方向热度较高。本省2026年高考总人数约52.1万（仅总数），按近年物理类占比约73%估算，物理类考 生约38.0万，较2025年26.1万大幅增长约46%，竞争显著加剧。，物理类本科批从2021年417分升至2025年463分，整体上升趋势；上海财经大学 位于上海市，属长三角核心城市，对江苏考生具有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10262名、2026年计划小幅扩招 （加剧竞争）、本省物理类考生大幅增长约46%（显著加剧竞争）、财经类专业热度分化观望略有升温、学校声誉平稳等因素，竞争加剧效应占主导。预测2026年最低位次约10606 名，区间10106–11106名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 4578 → 5628 → 8828 → 9940 → 10262, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4634 positions in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10262. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 45 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 70 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 73, an increase of 3 from 2025, a small expansion of about 4.3%, theoretically slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 reputation documents, there are no significant events recorded for Shanghai University of Finance and Economics, with overall reputation stable. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 99th (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure, and no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal application heat signals. It has A+ in Business Administration, A+ in Applied Economics, A in Theoretical Economics, and A- in Statistics, totaling 4 A-level disciplines, with top-tier financial and economic academic strength nationally, continuing to attract high-scoring students. It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 35th, stable in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top national financial and economic institutions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors in 2024 showed 'differentiated观望' (heat_index 65.49), slightly warming compared to 2023. Statistics A- corresponds to high popularity for newly established majors like Data Science and Artificial Intelligence. The total number of Gaokao examinees in the province for 2026 is about 521,000 (total only). Estimating based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, the Physics Category examinees are about 380,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 261,000 in 2025, markedly intensifying competition. The Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff rose from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, exerting strong regional appeal to Jiangsu examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10262, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (intensifying competition), the significant increase of about 46% in provincial Physics Category examinees (markedly intensifying competition), the differentiated but slightly warming popularity of finance and economics majors, and stable school reputation, the competition intensification effect dominates. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 10606, with a range of 10106–11106.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10106–11106, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting, Finance Dual Degree, Mathematics + Economics Dual Degree) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. Rankings better than the lower bound (<10106) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; rankings near the upper bound (>11106) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 794 → 1205 → 1165 → 1122 → 1599, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking moved back by about 477 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1599. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 20 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 29 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 28, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.4%, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions. The 2026 reputation file records no significant events for Shanghai University of Finance and Economics, with overall reputation stable. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 99th (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure, and no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal application heat signals. Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, totaling 4 A-class disciplines, with top national strength in finance and economics, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics/economy majors in 2024 was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', slightly warming compared to 2023; accounting/finance/auditing in 2024 was 'recommended' (61.31), with overall social attention to finance and economics majors still high. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 521,000 (total only), with History Category estimated at about 27% based on recent years, resulting in about 141,000 History Category examinees, a significant increase of about 45% compared to 97,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. The History Category undergraduate batch score rose from 476 in 2021 to 482 in 2025, overall stable. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to Jiangsu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1599, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (easing competition), the significant increase of about 45% in provincial History Category examinees (intensifying competition), the differentiated and slightly warming popularity of finance and economics majors, and stable university reputation, the competition intensification effect dominates. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1596, with a range of 1356–1836.
